metadata.title: Build an srx_ace_v3_agent for workflow orchestration using memory_lens, but block until tool permission boundaries and regional compliance constraints are clarified.

mission.primary_objective: Build an srx_ace_v3_agent for workflow orchestration using memory_lens, but block until tool permission boundaries and regional compliance constraints are clarified.
mission.success_definition: Agent rejects any tool call outside permitted list.; Memory_lens logs all access and retention events.; Agent provides clear permission denial messages with reason.; Compliance audit trail is generated for each orchestration run.

in_scope.item: Workflow orchestration agent with memory_lens integration; scope limited to defined tool permissions and compliance with African regional data laws.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: Agent rejects any tool call outside permitted list.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 2
gate.pass_condition: Memory_lens logs all access and retention events.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 3
gate.pass_condition: Agent provides clear permission denial messages with reason.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 4
gate.pass_condition: Compliance audit trail is generated for each orchestration run.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

execution_laws.item: Tool permissions must be explicitly enumerated and validated per workflow step.
Memory_lens must not retain sensitive data beyond session scope without explicit consent.
Agent must comply with local data protection regulations (e.g., POPIA, GDPR if applicable).
No escalation of privileges beyond defined tool set.

implementation_contract.item: Workflow orchestration agent with memory_lens integration; scope limited to defined tool permissions and compliance with African regional data laws.

verification_contract.item: Agent rejects any tool call outside permitted list.
Memory_lens logs all access and retention events.
Agent provides clear permission denial messages with reason.
Compliance audit trail is generated for each orchestration run.

receipt_contract.item: fields: workflow_id; step; tool_used; permission_granted; memory_lens_event; compliance_flag
validation: All tool_used must be in pre-approved list; memory_lens_event must include timestamp and retention policy applied.

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

validation_summary.sr8_summary: Unsafe certainty: The raw_intent lacks explicit tool permission boundaries, memory_lens scope definition, and fails to specify which workflow orchestration domain (e.g., financial, healthcare, logistics) is targeted. The 'nontechnical_business_owner in Africa' context introduces ambiguous regional compliance requirements (e.g., data sovereignty, GDPR, local regulations) that are not addressed. The 'chaos input type: tool_permission_confusion' indicates a high risk of privilege escalation or unauthorized access if permissions are not precisely defined. Without clear constraints on tool access, memory retention policies, and acceptance criteria for permission validation, any compiled agent would pose a security and compliance risk. A repair receipt is required to document the missing constraints and request clarification before proceeding.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: SR8 canonical validation status is fail.; SR8 governance flag marks the artifact incomplete.; SR8 governance flag requires human review.

required_repairs.item: SR8 canonical validation status is fail.
SR8 governance flag marks the artifact incomplete.
SR8 governance flag requires human review.

repair_prompt.resume_instruction: Repair canonical SR8 fields and rerun transform.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
